plan.caption:
Mewtwo Star from EX Holon Phantoms is worth $7,100. For one card.

It is one of the rarest pulls in the set, and the artwork is why collectors chase it.

Would you keep it or sell it? Tell us below.

pokeev.com runs the live Expected Value on every set, so you know exactly what your pulls are worth.
link in bio -> pokeev.com

brief.cardBody: EX Holon Phantoms crown jewel. The card the whole set chases.
brief.craftBody: Fukuda layers multicolored light bursts across deep black space. The holo shifts each point of light as the card tilts.
brief.sceneBody: Mewtwo hovers against a cosmic backdrop, rendered in cool silver-blue. The Star mark sits above the name bar.
brief.oddsBody: Rip a sealed booster and|the odds are 214 to 1.

vision.subject: Mewtwo Star floating in a starfield, arms outstretched
vision.sceneBody: Mewtwo hovers against a deep cosmic backdrop, body rendered in cool silver-blue. | The full Star designation mark sits above the name bar, confirming its 1-per-deck rarity.
vision.craftBody: Masakazu Fukuda's background layers multicolored light bursts, red, green, and white, across deep black space. | The holo treatment makes each point of light shift as the card tilts.
